tests.fragile_logic: Subscriber count management and auth state race conditions during rapid mount/unmount cycles
tests.failure_mode: Double-decrement of subscriberCount, auth state leaked between test runs, cleanup race during sign-in

tests.fragile_logic: Role hierarchy comparisons using >= operator, permission matrix lookups with null roles
tests.failure_mode: Off-by-one errors in isAtLeast(), missing permission in matrix causing silent failures, null role edge cases

tests.fragile_logic: Invoice derivation filter (actual_amount > 0) and null vs zero handling in aggregations
tests.failure_mode: Missing invoices when actual_amount is exactly 0, null vs undefined inconsistencies

tests.fragile_logic: Online/offline state race condition and base version capture timing for updates
tests.failure_mode: isOnline changes between check and mutation execution, missing entity ID for base version storage

tests.fragile_logic: Debounce timeout cleanup and user ID comparison for toast filtering
tests.failure_mode: Memory leak from uncanceled pending timeouts, toast spam when currentUserId is null

tests.fragile_logic: Floating point to cents conversion, CSI division 01 detection, forecast_amount fallback logic
tests.failure_mode: Rounding errors accumulate across many line items, off-by-one in CSI code check, null vs zero budget confusion

tests.fragile_logic: Percentage validation boundaries and retainage calculation rounding
tests.failure_mode: Off-by-one in percent complete validation, floating point drift in AIA G702 calculations

tests.fragile_logic: Division by zero in variance calculations, array aggregations with null values, date parsing from schedule activities
tests.failure_mode: NaN propagation from division by zero, null/undefined in reduce operations, invalid dates causing NaN in elapsed time

tests.fragile_logic: JSON.stringify comparison for field equality, field exclusions (updated_at, id), empty object handling
tests.failure_mode: Different JSON serialization order causing false conflicts, undefined vs null comparison, missing field exclusions

tests.fragile_logic: undefined vs null return value inconsistency
tests.failure_mode: Consuming code expecting null instead of undefined, or vice versa
